GamifiedButton.description: Duolingo-style tactile button. Solid background color, darker solid border-bottom (e.g., 4px), rounded corners.

XPProgressBar.description: Rounded pill track with an inner filled pill. Electric yellow fill inside a light gray track. Border width 2px.

StreakBadge.description: Small pill container with a fire icon and streak number. Text color in Coral Red. Bounces on app open.

LevelCard.description: Showcases the current level (Spark/Ignite/Blaze/Inferno). Bold typography, large center icon using Lucide.

Onboarding.layout: Full screen center aligned content. Top 40% contains abstract vibrant 3D image. Bottom 60% contains prompt '¿Para qué quieres usar tu creatividad?' and selection buttons.
Onboarding.interactions: Buttons squish on press. Sequential fade-in for options.

HomeDashboard.header: Top bar with Level Badge (Left) and Streak Counter (Right).
HomeDashboard.content: Vertical scroll. 'Desafío Diario' (Daily Challenge) as massive hero card. 'Entrenador de Ideas' and 'Conector de Conceptos' as large stacked cards below.

DailyChallenge.layout: Card-based prompt at the top. Large text input area. 'Enviar' (Submit) gamified button pinned to bottom.

IdeaTrainer.layout: Chat interface. AI bubbles in light Violet background, User bubbles in surface white with borders. Socratic AI persona.
IdeaTrainer.animations: New messages pop in with a spring scaling effect (from 0.8 to 1.0).

DistantConcepts.layout: Two distinct cards side-by-side or stacked. Action button 'Fusionar' (Fuse) triggers interaction. Results displayed in a glowing bordered card below.

motion_and_interactions.level_up_celebration: Full screen overlay. Level badge scales up dramatically with spring physics (damping: 12, stiffness: 100).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Slide horizontally with standard mobile navigation fluid motion.

image_urls.description: Abstract colorful 3D shapes for onboarding step 1
Abstract shapes in pastel colors for onboarding step 2

testing_attributes.instructions: All interactive elements MUST have `testID` attribute formatted as kebab-case-role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native components (.js files) with StyleSheet or NativeWind if configured. Build layouts using View, Text, TouchableOpacity.
For GamifiedButton, implement a custom pressable that animates translateY and borderBottomWidth on press to create a tactile squish effect.
Apply Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) principles: heavy borders, rounded geometries, bright contrast.
The UI must be entirely in Spanish (Castellano).
Avoid generic soft drop shadows. Instead, use hard 'Neobrutalist' or gamified borders (e.g., solid 2px borders with solid offset bottom borders) for cards and buttons.
